title: eryngium carlinoides
intro: Eryngium carlinoides, also known as California thistle or carlin's thistle, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Eryngium carlinoides can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
